name: prism-platform
description: PRISM platform — unified inventory, LSP design, and IPAM

scripts.dev: concurrently -n lsp-api,inv-api,notes-api,ipam-api,web -c cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,green "npm run dev:lsp-api" "npm run dev:inv-api" "npm run dev:notes-api" "npm run dev:ipam-api" "npm run dev:platform"
scripts.dev:lsp-only: concurrently -n lsp-api,lsp-web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:lsp-api" "cd modules/lsp/frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n lsp-api,inv-api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:lsp-api" "cd modules/inventory/backend && npm start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd platform/frontend && npm install && cd ../../modules/lsp/frontend && npm install && cd ../inventory/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../../notes/backend && npm install && cd ../../modules/ipam/backend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:lsp && npm run test:inventory && npm run test:notes && npm run test:ipam && npm run test:platform
scripts.test:lsp: cd modules/lsp/backend && python -m pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.test:inventory: cd modules/inventory/backend && node scripts/test-all.js && cd ../frontend && npm run build && npm test
scripts.test:platform: cd platform/frontend && npm run build && npm test
